flags.description: Master toggle. Off = new-identity creation refuses with 503. Ops-only — used during migration windows.
Off = strong_password rule skips the HIBP call. Falls back to policy-only. Toggle off during HIBP outages or when running in air-gapped environments.
Off = MFA enrolment refuses with 503. Existing enrolments continue to verify. Reserved for KMS incident-response.
Off = MFA verification always passes. RESERVED for catastrophic incident recovery only. Requires two-person sign-off to flip.
Off = lockout duration stays at base_lockout_minutes regardless of consecutive lockouts. Used for chaos testing.
Off = falls back to bcrypt hasher. Used when investigating an argon2id CPU-cost regression in a specific runtime.
Off = SuspiciousLoginNotification listener no-ops. Used when the notification is generating false positives (e.g. shared-IP CGNAT deployments).
Off = unverified identities can still authenticate. Reserved for admin-provisioned identities in test environments.
